overview: Izzet Prowess is a tempo strategy that leverages low-cost creatures with the Prowess mechanic to apply rapid pressure while cycling through the deck. By repeatedly casting instants and sorceries, the deck triggers Prowess to make creatures larger and faster, overwhelming opponents before they can stabilize. The package relies on efficient spell generation and evasion to bypass traditional removal.
win_conditions: Trading up with growing Prowess creatures
Overwhelming the opponent with multiple evasive threats
Casting a large number of instants to trigger Prowess repeatedly

keep_criteria: Hands with one-mana creatures and cheap instants
Draw engines that generate card advantage
Hands with at least three spells to trigger Prowess
mulligan_criteria: Hands missing instant or sorcery spells

early_game: Play one-drop creatures to establish board presence
Cast cheap instants to trigger Prowess and cycle
Apply early pressure to force opponent responses
mid_game: Use card draw to maintain spell density
Protect key threats with counterspells or evasion
Trade efficiently while growing creatures larger
late_game: Flood the board with multiple Prowess creatures
Use remaining spells to trigger Prowess for lethal damage
Stabilize against opponent finishers with removal or counters

key_cards.name: Astrologian's Planisphere
key_cards.notes: Cast instants to draw cards and fuel Prowess triggers

key_cards.name: Stormchaser's Talent
key_cards.notes: Use cheap spells to trigger Prowess repeatedly while cycling

key_cards.name: Flow State
key_cards.notes: Cast to draw cards and maintain a steady stream of instants for Prowess

sequencing_tips: Prioritize casting instants before combat to maximize Prowess triggers
Hold up mana for counterspells when facing control decks
Cycle dead cards to find more instants and keep Prowess active

matchups.advice: Use evasion to bypass early pressure and trade efficiently
Play around removal by keeping spells in hand to trigger Prowess
Race before they stabilize with value engines
